behavior_in_task_description.reason: All file paths, fixture names, parameter names, markers, and thresholds (max_head_offpolicyness>=100, consumer_batch_size>=3, should_accept_fn removal) are explicitly stated in instruction.md.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes required outcomes (scope, parameter constraints, marker removal) without providing the exact diff or code.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check ranges (>=100, >=3) and scope in {'module','session'}, allowing multiple valid implementations.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests use AST parsing plus exec/eval of decorator and assignment expressions with mock pytest to verify runtime behavior, not just text matches.

test_not_tautological.reason: Each f2p asserts a concrete state change (scope kwarg, keyword values, removed decorators/methods) that a stub cannot trivially satisfy.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Tests cover fixture scope, tmp_path_factory param, pytestmark, slow removal, should_accept_fn removal, and threshold values as required.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comment headers (Gate, Fail-to-pass) and have descriptive names/docstrings.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and identifiers are consistent across instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names fixtures and files but does not pinpoint specific line numbers or provide literal replacement code.
